prompt: Update client authentication interfaces to accept CryptoKey instances alongside PrivateKey and PublicKey types.
Refactor the code to use string literals instead of constants for the authorization header value.
Refactor DPOP JWT proof logic to remove redundant private key and public key validation checks.
Update the library version to 0.3.2 and allow CryptoKey instances as input.
Refactor the codebase to enforce stricter TypeScript compile checks by enabling noImplicitAny.
Refactor nonce validation errors to use a consistent OPE error type instead of mixed errors.
Update the OAuth2 library version from 0.3.2 to 0.3.3 in package.json and source code.
Refactor the codebase to remove support for legacy HMAC algorithms and update related type definitions.
